# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following versions of Solari are currently being supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0.0 | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of Solari seriously. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in this project, please report it to us as follows:

1.  **Do not** open a public issue.
2.  Please use the **Private Vulnerability Reporting** feature on GitHub (if enabled) or contact the project maintainer directly.
3.  Provide a detailed description of the vulnerability and steps to reproduce it.

We will acknowledge your report and work to address the issue as quickly as possible.
